rulings.Case Title: CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. CHINESE MERCHANTS REALTY ASSOCIATION AKA SEE YIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Pltf Complaint As A Whole Ane Each Of The Causes Of Action Therein
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 1.- CROSS COMPLAINANT CHINESE MERCHANTS REALTY ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To PlAINTIFF'S Complaint As A Whole And Each Of The Causes Of Action Therein. Cross-Complainant's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is GRANTED as follows: 1. Judgment on the Pleadings is granted as to the first cause of action for specific performance with leave to amend to allege bargained-for consideration promised prior to and in exchange for donation; and all elements of enforceable gift, including "complete gift where nothing gift left undone" in light of paragraph 2 of Assignment. 2. GRANTED without leave to amend as to causes of action for unjust enrichment and constructive trust. 3.GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts showing detrimental reliance and harm. Plaintiff shall have 10 days leave to amend from the Notice of Entry of order. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: H/S PARTNERS II, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. RAYMOND G. CHOY, HUSBAND AS COMMUNITY PROPERTY et al (CCP. 170.6 WONG)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 2. - INTERVENOR JOHN WAI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Intervene. John Wai's Motion for Leave to Intervene is GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: KELLIE JACKSON VS. SUSAN KOE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS SUSAN KOE AND PHILIP KROHN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleged facts re: conscious disregard of plaintiff's rights. CCC 3294. Prayer for prejudgment interest is not improper at least as to purely economic losses. CCC 3288. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING AND BANK OF NEW YORK MELLONS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to August 26, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C no later than August 9, 2013 and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YANCY VS. XIANG KAI, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 5.- DEFENDANT XIANG KAI, LAVANDER CASA, INC., CINDY ZHANG AND RAYMOND ZHANG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is continued to August 6, 2013 per stipulation of the parties. =(D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: CREF SANSOME, LLC VS. HEALTHCORP, INC, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Order To File Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 6. - DEFENDANT HEALTHCORP AND DUDNYK ACQUISITIONS' Application For Order To File Under Seal. Defendant's Motion to Seal is GRANTED. Asset Purchase Agreement may be filed under seal. All references to the contents of Asset Purchase Agreement in filings in support of opposition to Motions to Attach may be redacted. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: CREF SANSOME, LLC VS. HEALTHCORP, INC, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 6.-PLAINTIFF CREF SANSOME'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. Plaintiff's Application for Right to Attach as to Healthcorp, Inc is OFF CALENDAR per moving party. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: CREF SANSOME, LLC VS. HEALTHCORP, INC, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 6.- PLAINTIFF CREF SANSOME'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. Plaintiff's Application for Right to Attach as to Stratagem Healthcare Communications is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden and opposition party provided no evidence to the contrary. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: CREF SANSOME, LLC VS. HEALTHCORP, INC, A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 6. - PLAINTIFF CREF SANSOME'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. Plaintiff's Application for Right to Attach as to Dudnyk Acquisition, LLC is DENIED. Moving party fails to show assumption of liability. See Ray v. Alad Corporation (1977) 19 Cal.3d 22. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN TABER VS. JEREMY GIBNEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 7. - DEFENDANT JEREMY GIBNEY DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. Second Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Lilenthal v. Superior Court (1993) 12 Cal.App.4th 1854 is not on point and Demurrer is not a proper vehicle to raise issues of fact regarding other tenants under the Lease. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION STREET SF LLC et al VS. CHRISTIAN REAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 8. - PLAINTIFF MISSION STREET SF AND 1517 HOLDINGS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date And To Permit Further Depositions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT PHILLIP GARCIA'S Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date And To Permit Further Depositions. Defendant's Motion to Continue Trial Date and to Permit Further Depositions is GRANTED. Trial is continued to August 12, 2013. Defendant may take any further deposition(s) in accordance with new discovery cut off date based on August 12, 2013 trial date. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ABDEL KADAR CHENBOD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 10. PLAINTIFF ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to July 29, 2013 to be heard with other pending motion. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPHINE CHU VS. KEINEN A. EDWARDS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 11. - DEFENDANTS KEINEN EDWARDS AND VICTORIA HUERTA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendants' Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to reconcile demand for June rent in "3 Day Notice" and demand for daily damages starting June 19, 2013. Plaintiff shall have 5 days to amend from the Notice of entry of Order. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPHINE CHU VS. KEINEN A. EDWARDS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 11. - DEFENDANTS KEINEN EDWARDS AND VICTORIA HUERTA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to reconcile allegations in "3 Day Notice" and 17c of Form Complaint. Plaintiff shall have 5 days to amend from the Notice of Entry of Order. = (D501/HD)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. ASHLEY RAGES et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT ASHLEY RAGGS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to reconcile premises address in complaint and lease. Plaintiff shall have 5 days to amend from the Notice of Entry of Order. = (D501/HD)
